description:
Recto: The upper part is probably medical recipes in Arabic script. The lower part is business accounts in Judaeo-Arabic.

Verso: Very damaged text in both Judaeo-Arabic and Arabic script, possibly medical recipes. Mentions 400 dirhams of honey.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
